title: circaea lutetiana var. cordifolia
intro: Circaea lutetiana var. cordifolia, also known as heart-leaved enchanter's nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Circaea lutetiana var. cordifolia is prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
